global.description: The ad features a vibrant purple background with game gear icons and a clear call to action.
global.main_message: Unlock rare gear and play with friends tonight.

elements.label: Purple background
elements.description: A solid purple background fills the entire canvas, providing a vibrant backdrop.

elements.label: Game gear icons
elements.description: Four circular icons representing game gear are arranged in a grid pattern, each with a dark circle in the center.

elements.label: StormByte logo
elements.description: The logo 'StormByte' is displayed prominently in bold, white text at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Icon placeholder
elements.description: A small circular icon placeholder is positioned above the logo, possibly for user-generated content.

elements.label: Icon placeholder
elements.description: Another small circular icon placeholder is located next to the previous one, maintaining symmetry.

elements.label: Icon placeholder
elements.description: A third circular icon placeholder is positioned below the main subject, similar in style to the others.

elements.label: Icon placeholder
elements.description: A fourth circular icon placeholder is located next to the previous one, completing the grid.

elements.label: Arrow icon
elements.description: A small right-facing arrow icon is positioned at the top right corner, suggesting action.

elements.label: Unlock message
elements.description: The text 'Unlock rare gear' is displayed in bold white font, emphasizing the main action of the ad.

elements.label: Play with friends
elements.description: The text 'Play with friends tonight' is shown in a smaller font beneath the main message, providing additional context.

elements.label: UGC label
elements.description: The text 'UGC' is displayed in a small white box at the top left, indicating user-generated content.

elements.label: UGC icon
elements.description: A small circular icon is positioned below the UGC label, possibly representing user-generated content.

elements.label: Main message
elements.description: The main message 'Unlock rare gear Play with friends tonight' is prominently displayed in bold white text.
elements.text_content: Unlock rare gear Play with friends tonight

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: The button 'Try for free' is shown at the bottom in a rounded rectangular shape, inviting user interaction.

elements.label: Footer text
elements.description: The text 'Try for free' is displayed in a smaller font at the bottom of the ad, encouraging action.

elements.label: UGC label
elements.description: The text 'UGC' is displayed in a small white box at the top left, indicating user-generated content.

embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, the main message is centered, and the call to action is at the bottom.
